arts.ttl: Further than New York! | Why Chelsea face a mammoth trip to Kazakhstan
arts.sum: Chelsea face a 7,000-mile round trip to Kazakhstan to face Astana - a flight time of around eight hours and temperatures of minus 13. Incredibly, New York is 18 miles closer to London than the Almaty Stadium, which is in south-eastern Kazakhstan.
